name_en: A highly anticipated BV Bottega Veneta lunch box bag🔥. The entire body is crafted from top-tier nappa lambskin, very soft and lightweight. It also features the intrecciato weaving technique, developed by the two founders over several months since the brand's inception. Completely hand-woven by Italian artisans, perfectly embodying Bottega's artisanal spirit. The bag shape is practical and popular, and the slightly curved opening fits the wrist better. Model: 754443. Dimensions: 22*13*9
